tasks.label: Compile All Sources
tasks.command: ghdl -a --std=08 src/alu.vhd src/alu_control.vhd src/data_memory.vhd src/register_file.vhd src/instruction_memory.vhd src/control_unit.vhd

tasks.label: Compile Testbenches
tasks.command: ghdl -a --std=08 testbench/tb_alu.vhd testbench/tb_data_memory.vhd testbench/tb_register_file.vhd testbench/tb_instruction_memory.vhd testbench/tb_control_unit.vhd

tasks.label: Run ALL Tests
tasks.command: mkdir -p waveforms && ghdl -a --std=08 src/alu.vhd src/alu_control.vhd src/data_memory.vhd src/register_file.vhd src/instruction_memory.vhd src/control_unit.vhd testbench/tb_alu.vhd testbench/tb_data_memory.vhd testbench/tb_register_file.vhd testbench/tb_instruction_memory.vhd testbench/tb_control_unit.vhd && ghdl -e --std=08 tb_ALU && ghdl -r --std=08 tb_ALU --vcd=waveforms/tb_alu.vcd && ghdl -e --std=08 tb_Data_Memory && ghdl -r --std=08 tb_Data_Memory --vcd=waveforms/tb_data_memory.vcd && ghdl -e --std=08 tb_Register_File && ghdl -r --std=08 tb_Register_File --vcd=waveforms/tb_register_file.vcd && ghdl -e --std=08 tb_Instruction_Memory && ghdl -r --std=08 tb_Instruction_Memory --vcd=waveforms/tb_instruction_memory.vcd && ghdl -e --std=08 tb_Control_Unit && ghdl -r --std=08 tb_Control_Unit --vcd=waveforms/tb_control_unit.vcd && echo '===== ALL TESTS PASSED ====='
